microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defined PRDs, wrote user stories, and delivered self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across the fleet.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as single-threaded lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract across matrixed hardware, software, and ops teams.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to **cut planning cycle time 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, scaling team leverage without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that activated utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the backlog to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a top-tier capability.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time 83%** and enabling faster requirements traceability across teams.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M in accelerated revenue** through faster infrastructure readiness.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then defined a product roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing backlog prioritization and **reducing operational drag** at scale.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** to track and surface automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-impact opportunities and make data-driven prioritization decisions on the region launch program.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and dependency map across **1,200+ stations**, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition — mirroring the lifecycle ownership and field-sustainment rigor required for deployed hardware systems.

Prioritized a **40+ ticket backlog** across sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving high-severity integration blockers and stabilizing the developer intake process for an embedded robotics software platform.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable release cadence for integrated hardware-software systems.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that improved conversion rate and reduced scheduling toil.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence, Google profile, and targeting to improve top-of-funnel efficiency.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's ability to make sound commercial trade-off decisions.
